proxyUrl.label: Proxy URL
proxyUrl.help: Optional. URL of a Headroom proxy on localhost (example: http://127.0.0.1:8787). If omitted, plugin auto-detects defaults.

proxyPort.label: Proxy Port
proxyPort.help: Default port used for auto-detect/auto-start when proxyUrl is not set (default: 8787).

pythonPath.label: Python Path
pythonPath.help: Optional explicit python executable for python fallback launcher (for example: python, python3, py, or full path).
